steps.t: Idhremmin is at Mincham's Camp in the North Downs, at the south-west edge of the Fields of Fornost. You should ask Idhremmin what he hears.
Idhremmin is at Mincham's Camp in the North Downs, at the south-west edge of the Fields of Fornost. You should consult with Idhremmin about what you h…
The song came from the north-west of Mincham's Camp, in the Fields of Fornost. You should search for the source of the strange song.
Idhremmin can be found at Mincham's Camp on the edge of the Fields of Fornost. You should return to Idhremmin at Mincham's Camp.
